scripts.dev: env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma && env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" next dev
scripts.dev:smoke: env DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/record-smoke.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma && env DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/record-smoke.db" next dev
scripts.db:push:smoke: rm -f /tmp/record-smoke.db && touch /tmp/record-smoke.db && env DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/record-smoke.db" prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma
scripts.seed:demo:dev: env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma && env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" DEMO_SEED_CONFIRM=YES tsx scripts/setup-demo-data.ts
scripts.seed:demo:smoke: env DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/record-smoke.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma && env DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/record-smoke.db" DEMO_SEED_CONFIRM=YES tsx scripts/setup-demo-data.ts
scripts.sync:public:dev: env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma && env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" PUBLIC_PROFILE_SYNC_CONFIRM=YES tsx scripts/sync-public-profile.ts
scripts.sync:public:smoke: env DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/record-smoke.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma && env DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/record-smoke.db" PUBLIC_PROFILE_SYNC_CONFIRM=YES tsx scripts/sync-public-profile.ts
scripts.demo:prep: npm run db:push:smoke && npm run seed:demo:smoke && npm run sync:public:smoke -- syb2020
scripts.preview: npm run dev & sleep 3 && open http://localhost:3000
scripts.preview-all: npm run dev & sleep 3 && open http://localhost:3000 && open http://localhost:3000/login && open http://localhost:3000/signup && open http://localhost:3000/dashboard
scripts.build: prisma generate && env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma && next build
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run ocr:fixtures
scripts.postinstall: prisma generate && env DATABASE_URL="file:$PWD/prisma/dev.db" prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.dev.prisma
